notes.behavior_plane: return decomposed into survival (episode length) and velocity (return/step - 1); each seed classified as collapsed/stander/hopper-faller/sustained-hopper
notes.iqm: interquartile mean (drop min and max seed, average middle 3) with stratified bootstrap 95% CIs; robust to bimodal seed distributions
notes.convergence_triple: t_reach_90pct = first episode at 90% of own peak (self-relative); drawdown = (peak-final)/peak; regressed = drawdown > regress_rel_drop
notes.convergence_legacy: sustained crossing of smoothed return; warm-up window excluded
notes.peak_and_final: both windowed means (consistent estimators) so regression is not biased by a single lucky checkpoint
notes.plateau_eps: range-relative: plateau_rel_eps * (max-min return) of that run
notes.stability: primary metric is absolute cross-seed std; CV reported only when n_seeds>1 and mean>=min_mean_for_cv
notes.findings_significance: comparisons use IQM CI overlap when available, falling back to margin_in_pooled_std

findings.best_overall: TIE: reinforce_ema  lr=1e-04  upd=1  ≈  reinforce_batch  lr=1e-03  upd=5
